con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="HealthPolicySoapService" targetNamespace="http://soap.insurance.example.com/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://soap.insurance.example.com/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:ns1="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"> <wsdl:types> <xs:schema elementFormDefault="unqualified" targetNamespace="http://soap.insurance.example.com/" version="1.0" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="getPolicyDetails" type="tns:getPolicyDetails"/> <xs:element name="getPolicyDetailsResponse" type="tns:getPolicyDetailsResponse"/> <xs:element name="getPolicyStatus" type="tns:getPolicyStatus"/> <xs:element name="getPolicyStatusResponse" type="tns:getPolicyStatusResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="getPolicyDetails"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg0" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="getPolicyDetailsResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:policyResponse"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="policyResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="insuredName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="policyNumber" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="policyStatus" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="getPolicyStatus"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg0" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="getPolicyStatusResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="getPolicyDetails"> <wsdl:part element="tns:getPolicyDetails" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="getPolicyStatus"> <wsdl:part element="tns:getPolicyStatus" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="getPolicyDetailsResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:getPolicyDetailsResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="getPolicyStatusResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:getPolicyStatusResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="HealthPolicySoapService"> <wsdl:operation name="getPolicyDetails"> <wsdl:input message="tns:getPolicyDetails" name="getPolicyDetails"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:getPolicyDetailsResponse" name="getPolicyDetailsResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="getPolicyStatus"> <wsdl:input message="tns:getPolicyStatus" name="getPolicyStatus"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:getPolicyStatusResponse" name="getPolicyStatusResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="HealthPolicySoapServiceSoapBinding" type="tns:HealthPolicySoapService"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="getPolicyDetails"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="getPolicyDetails"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="getPolicyDetailsResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="getPolicyStatus"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="getPolicyStatus"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="getPolicyStatusResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="HealthPolicySoapService"> <wsdl:port binding="tns:HealthPolicySoapServiceSoapBinding" name="HealthPolicySoapPort"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:9080/insurance-health-component/HealthPolicySoapService"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>
